title: Duhaldea forrestii
taxonomy: Duhaldea forrestii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of thistle native to the Himalayan region. The plant is classified under the genus Duhaldea, which was previously part of the genus Acmadenia but was later reclassified. Duhaldea forrestii is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within its genus. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of this plant.
